domain: construction tools, concrete forming hardware, tile-setting aids, masonry layout fixtures, and jobsite measurement accessories

ideas.product_context: A reusable clamp used by concrete crews to hold intersecting form panels square while bracing is installed.
ideas.core_function: Locks against two panel faces and provides a visible reference corner for checking alignment before pouring.
ideas.likely_main_part: L-shaped clamp body with sliding jaw blocks, screw bosses, ribbed webs, and panel-contact pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests perpendicular fixture geometry, sliding components, clamping pads, reinforcement ribs, and readable functional contact surfaces.

ideas.product_context: A handheld layout tool used to mark repeatable form tie locations across temporary wall forms.
ideas.core_function: Indexes from a previous mark or panel edge and positions a marking window for the next tie location.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat rail-like body with hooked reference end, sliding marker window, locking thumb pad, and recessed grip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises long datum features, movable index windows, shallow engraved reference zones, and ergonomic handling surfaces.

ideas.idea_title: Reusable chamfer strip holder for concrete forms
ideas.product_context: A clip-on accessory used to hold chamfer strips along exposed form edges before concrete placement.
ideas.core_function: Captures a chamfer insert and clips it to a form board without fasteners through the finished face.
ideas.likely_main_part: Springy clip channel with triangular insert pocket, outer latch lip, and pull-tab grip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges angled channel geometry, thin retaining lips, clip deflection intent, and nested removable insert forms.

ideas.idea_title: Form panel lifting handle with wedge lock
ideas.product_context: A temporary handle attached to modular concrete form panels during setup and stripping.
ideas.core_function: Grips an existing panel slot and creates a comfortable handhold for moving the panel safely.
ideas.likely_main_part: Loop handle body with tapered wedge tongue, cam lever pocket, and broad load-spreading foot.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines ergonomic loops, wedge engagement, lever clearance, and load-bearing contact pads in one compact assembly.

ideas.product_context: A jobsite bracket used to support temporary screed rails along slab edges and pour boundaries.
ideas.core_function: Holds a straight rail at an adjustable elevation while staying anchored to surrounding formwork.
ideas.likely_main_part: Offset bracket with rail cradle, vertical adjustment slot, locking knob boss, and clamp foot.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests offset load paths, slot-based adjustment, rail cradles, and the relationship between temporary support and reference surface.

ideas.product_context: A hardware saddle used where diagonal braces meet vertical concrete form panels.
ideas.core_function: Receives a brace member at a set angle and spreads force into the form frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: Angled saddle plate with curved brace seat, side ears, fastener bosses, and gusset ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises angled intersections, concave seating surfaces, gusseted reinforcement, and asymmetric fastening layouts.

ideas.product_context: A hand tool for removing reusable cone pieces from concrete form tie locations after stripping.
ideas.core_function: Engages the cone rim and applies twisting force without damaging the surrounding concrete face.
ideas.likely_main_part: T-handle tool with forked nose, curved engagement teeth, and protective bearing ring.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small engagement teeth, circular rim contact, hand-tool ergonomics, and controlled clearance around a recessed feature.

ideas.product_context: A temporary clip used along concrete form seams where crews want to hold a gasket or foam strip in place.
ideas.core_function: Pins a compressible sealing strip against a form joint until normal form pressure takes over.
ideas.likely_main_part: C-shaped clip with gasket groove, squeeze tabs, hinge-like flex region, and outer pull ridge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges thin spring sections, captured soft-strip intent, seam-centered placement, and functional snap-on geometry.

ideas.product_context: A tile-setting hand tool used to tighten leveling wedges through spacer clips during floor or wall installation.
ideas.core_function: Pushes a wedge into a leveling clip with controlled pressure while keeping tile faces protected.
ideas.likely_main_part: Pliers body with offset jaws, replaceable soft pads, ratchet notch arc, and hand grips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests articulated tool geometry, offset jaw contact, replaceable pad detail, and ratchet-like incremental features.

ideas.product_context: A small finishing tool used after tile adhesive cures to pull reusable spacers from grout joints.
ideas.core_function: Hooks under spacer tabs and lifts them out without chipping tile edges.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slim handle with angled hook tip, edge guard shoe, and textured thumb rest.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises delicate hook geometry, protective contact shoe forms, small ergonomic surfaces, and clearance-sensitive tool tips.

ideas.product_context: A layout aid placed across a room centerline or feature line while planning tile courses.
ideas.core_function: Bridges over chalk lines and provides repeatable reference notches for dry-lay positioning.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low bridge rail with sight windows, stepped reference notches, rubber feet, and pencil guide slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests transparent or open sight features, repeated notches, non-slip feet, and visible alignment references.

ideas.product_context: A tile-setting aid for copying irregular wall, pipe, or trim profiles onto cut tiles.
ideas.core_function: Transfers a contour through sliding pins held in a shallow frame so the shape can be traced.
ideas.likely_main_part: Comb frame with many parallel sliding fingers, side locks, and broad tracing edge.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges dense repeated movable elements, constrained sliding paths, thin pins, and a captured but adjustable profile.

ideas.product_context: A fixture used by tile installers to keep a consistent reveal around recessed shower niches.
ideas.core_function: References the niche opening and tile face while marking trim and tile positions.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rectangular frame jig with adjustable corner tabs, ledge rests, and inset marking grooves.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises nested rectangular frames, adjustable tabs, corner clearances, and surfaces that must indicate layout intent.

ideas.product_context: A handheld gauge used to compare fresh trowel ridges against the intended notch pattern.
ideas.core_function: Provides a visual and tactile check that mortar ridges have the expected profile before tile placement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat gauge plate with multiple tooth silhouettes, handle slot, and wipe-clean beveled edges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated negative tooth profiles, thin gauge surfaces, labeled profile zones, and precise edge readability without exact sizing.

ideas.idea_title: Tile edge trim miter marking saddle
ideas.product_context: A marking aid for metal or plastic tile edge trims used around corners and transitions.
ideas.core_function: Holds trim in a stable channel and guides pencil marks for miter cuts.
ideas.likely_main_part: V-channel saddle with angled guide fences, retention lips, and underside anti-slip pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines nested trim channels, angled guide planes, retaining lips, and small support pads.

ideas.idea_title: Masonry block corner story pole clamp
ideas.product_context: A clamp-on fixture used with a vertical story pole during block wall layout.
ideas.core_function: Attaches to a pole and presents adjustable line holders for tracking courses and corner alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split clamp collar with sliding line tabs, locking screws, and molded course markers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests clamp collars, movable tabs, fine reference marks, and the relationship between vertical layout and horizontal string lines.

ideas.product_context: A masonry layout rail used to preview or mark staggered brick bond patterns before laying courses.
ideas.core_function: Indexes brick face positions and mortar joints along a wall run for consistent layout.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat rail with alternating reference windows, end hook, sliding stop, and joint-center notches.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises repeated staggered visual references, shallow notches, adjustable stops, and layout features that encode pattern logic.

ideas.product_context: A reusable corner fixture used to hold mason line at a block or brick wall corner.
ideas.core_function: Anchors to the corner and lets line wrap around a rotating post while maintaining clear sight lines.
ideas.likely_main_part: Corner clamp base with vertical turret post, line grooves, thumb latch, and protective jaw pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests corner gripping geometry, rotational line-post features, helical or grooved contact paths, and padded jaw interfaces.

ideas.product_context: A hand guide used during masonry finishing or restoration to keep joint raking visually consistent.
ideas.core_function: Runs along adjacent brick faces while a central guide controls the raking tool position.
ideas.likely_main_part: Bridge-shaped guide with twin shoe rails, central tool slot, and debris relief channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines twin reference surfaces, central slot geometry, shallow channels, and a bridge form that spans an irregular joint.

ideas.product_context: A masonry accessory used to mark cut or knockout areas on concrete masonry units for services or reinforcement.
ideas.core_function: Registers on block faces and outlines common openings while avoiding web and edge damage zones.
ideas.likely_main_part: Template plate with registration hooks, open marking windows, grip ridge, and orientation tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin template windows, block-face registration, directional markers, and negative-space geometry meant for tracing.

ideas.product_context: A measurement accessory that holds a laser target card on metal studs, form hardware, or equipment surfaces.
ideas.core_function: Positions a target face upright while allowing quick rotation and height adjustment on ferrous surfaces.
ideas.likely_main_part: Magnetic base with pivoting target plate, sliding stem, lock knob, and protective bumper edges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises magnetic base cues, pivot joints, sliding adjustment, flat target planes, and rugged protective features.

ideas.product_context: A compact accessory clipped to a tape measure hook for measuring from pipes, studs, or form edges with an offset.
ideas.core_function: Creates a temporary reference foot that catches around irregular edges while the tape remains readable.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clip-on hook body with curved catch lip, tape-hook pocket, spring latch, and wear pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small clip interfaces, curved edge catches, thin latch features, and accessory geometry built around an implied host tool.

ideas.product_context: A jobsite layout accessory used when snapping chalk lines around outside corners or columns.
ideas.core_function: Holds the chalk string off the corner edge and provides a smooth wrap path for continuous layout marks.
ideas.likely_main_part: Corner-mounted guide with rounded string channel, clamp wings, and chalk-residue relief grooves.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges smooth guide paths around corners, clamp wings, residue grooves, and geometry that controls a flexible line.

ideas.product_context: A survey and layout accessory attached to the base of a grade rod or measuring staff on rough jobsite surfaces.
ideas.core_function: Keeps the rod vertical and stable while presenting a consistent bottom contact point.
ideas.likely_main_part: Wide stabilizer foot with central rod socket, leveling bubble pocket, serrated ground pads, and release latch.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests broad base stability, socketed vertical alignment, bubble-level recesses, textured ground-contact surfaces, and latch details.

ideas.idea_title: Stud bay depth gauge for remodel layout
ideas.product_context: A measurement accessory used to probe wall cavities and locate usable clearance before installing blocking or boxes.
ideas.core_function: Slides into an opening and indicates relative depth while keeping the handle flush to the wall face.
ideas.likely_main_part: Telescoping probe with flush face plate, sliding indicator collar, end bumper, and finger pull.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises telescoping components, flush reference plates, indicator collars, and probe geometry designed for hidden spaces.

ideas.product_context: A jobsite layout tool used by carpenters and masons to compare diagonals of framed or formed openings.
ideas.core_function: Captures one diagonal reference and transfers it to the opposite diagonal for squareness checks.
ideas.likely_main_part: Extending bar assembly with corner cups, sliding lock collar, and visible comparison pointer.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests telescoping bar logic, corner cup contact geometry, comparison markers, and long slender alignment features.

ideas.product_context: A construction layout gauge used after concrete placement to check that anchor bolts project enough for base plates.
ideas.core_function: Drops over an anchor bolt and shows whether thread exposure and washer clearance are acceptable.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical sleeve gauge with side viewing window, base plate foot, and color-band recesses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines cylindrical clearance features, cutaway windows, datum feet, and visible pass-fail zones without specifying actual projection values.

ideas.product_context: A layout aid used before a concrete pour to space support chairs under reinforcing mesh or bars.
ideas.core_function: Indexes chair positions along a run and lets a worker mark or place supports consistently.
ideas.likely_main_part: Long comb-like template with repeated chair pockets, end reference hook, and carrying hand cutout.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises repeated pocket geometry, open handholds, edge referencing, and pattern-based placement intent.

ideas.product_context: A concrete flatwork tool used to hold flexible expansion joint material upright during placement.
ideas.core_function: Straddles the joint insert and keeps it aligned while adjacent concrete is worked.
ideas.likely_main_part: Forked alignment head with spring fingers, handle socket, and rounded concrete-contact skids.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests forked flexible jaws, temporary contact skids, socketed handle connection, and alignment around a thin inserted strip.

ideas.product_context: A layout fixture used when forming or setting masonry sill materials under windows or wall openings.
ideas.core_function: References the wall face and indicates a consistent outward drainage slope for the sill surface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Wedge-profile gauge body with face hook, small level vial recess, and sliding edge stop.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges wedge surfaces, visible reference hooks, inset vial pockets, and adjustable stops tied to a sloped datum.
